steps.title: Attach the song title
steps.content: The title A Tear directly identifies which hit song the sentence means. Because the title is essential identifying information, it should follow 'song' without punctuation.

steps.title: Reject separator marks
steps.content: Choice A uses a colon after an incomplete setup, Choice B uses a semicolon before a title rather than a clause, and Choice C wrongly treats the title as extra information. The remaining choice leaves the restrictive title attached to the noun. The answer is D.
